THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEZCANO, MICAELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELIAS, SANTOS HERNANDEZ, CARLOS OVIDIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11/8/95 $942.00 RENT, $162.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,104.00, LEASE FORFEITED
